allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(l['idLeague'], l['strLeague']\) for l in d.get\('leagues',[]\) if 'world cup' in \(l.get\('strLeague'\) or ''\).lower\(\) or 'fifa' in \(l.get\('strLeague'\) or ''\).lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:',d.get\('title'\)\); print\('extract:',\(d.get\('extract'\) or ''\)[:400]\)")
